languages.text: This weapon has a special attack that ignores enemy armour and deflection which is also used as AoO

languages.text: This weapon grants its wielder the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} and is also used to perform {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}.
languages.original_text: This weapon has a special attack that ignores enemy armour and deflection which is also used as AoO

traits.locale_text: This weapon grants its wearer the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy armour and deflection and is also used to perform attacks of opportunity.

This weapon grants its wielder the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} and is also used to perform {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}.
This weapon grants its wearer the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy armour and deflection and is also used to perform attacks of opportunity.

languages.text: Это оружие позволяет персонажу совершать {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Развоплощение{/g} — атаку, которая игнорирует {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броню{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражение{/g} противника, а также выполнять {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}атаки по возможности{/g}.
languages.original_text: This weapon grants its wielder the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} and is also used to perform {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Это оружие позволяет персонажу совершать {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Развоплощение{/g} — атаку, которая игнорирует {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броню{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражение{/g} противника, а также выполнять {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}атаки по возможности{/g}.

Это оружие позволяет персонажу совершать {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Развоплощение{/g} — атаку, которая игнорирует {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броню{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражение{/g} противника, а также выполнять {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}атаки по возможности{/g}.

languages.text: Esta arma concede a su portador el ataque {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Golpe fásico{/g}, que ignora la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g} y el {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}desvío{/g} del enemigo y que también se usa al lanzar {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}ataques de oportunidad{/g}.
languages.original_text: This weapon grants its wielder the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} and is also used to perform {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Esta arma concede a su portador el ataque {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Golpe fásico{/g}, que ignora la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g} y el {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}desvío{/g} del enemigo y que también se usa al lanzar {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}ataques de oportunidad{/g}.

languages.text: Diese Waffe gewährt ihrem Träger {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasenattacke{/g}, die die {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Deflektion{/g} des Gegners ignoriert und {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}Gelegenheitsangriffe{/g} ermöglicht.
languages.original_text: This weapon grants its wielder the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} and is also used to perform {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Diese Waffe gewährt ihrem Träger {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasenattacke{/g}, die die {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Deflektion{/g} des Gegners ignoriert und {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}Gelegenheitsangriffe{/g} ermöglicht.

languages.text: Cette arme confère {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Frappe en phase{/g} à son utilisateur. Cette attaque ignore l'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Armure{/g} et la {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Déflexion{/g} de l'ennemi, et permet d'effectuer des {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attaques d'opportunité{/g}.
languages.original_text: This weapon grants its wielder the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} and is also used to perform {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Cette arme confère {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Frappe en phase{/g} à son utilisateur. Cette attaque ignore l'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Armure{/g} et la {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Déflexion{/g} de l'ennemi, et permet d'effectuer des {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attaques d'opportunité{/g}.

languages.text: Bu silah, kullanan kişiye düşmanın {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırh{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}saptırma{/g} değerlerini yok sayan {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Evreli Atak{/g} saldırısını kazandırır. Ayrıca {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}fırsat saldırıları{/g} gerçekleştirmek için de kullanılır.
languages.original_text: This weapon grants its wielder the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} and is also used to perform {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Bu silah, kullanan kişiye düşmanın {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırh{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}saptırma{/g} değerlerini yok sayan {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Evreli Atak{/g} saldırısını kazandırır. Ayrıca {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}fırsat saldırıları{/g} gerçekleştirmek için de kullanılır.

languages.text: 此武器赋予其装备者{g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}相位打击{/g}能力，无视敌人的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}偏转{/g}，同时也可被用于{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}借机攻击{/g}。
languages.original_text: This weapon grants its wielder the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} and is also used to perform {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 此武器赋予其装备者{g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}相位打击{/g}能力，无视敌人的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}偏转{/g}，同时也可被用于{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}借机攻击{/g}。

languages.text: この武器は、敵の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}鎧{/g}や{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}防御{/g}を無視する{g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}フェイズストライク{/g}攻撃を装備者に与え、また{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}機会攻撃{/g}を行うのに使用されます。
languages.original_text: This weapon grants its wielder the {g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}Phasing Strike{/g} attack that ignores enemy {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} and is also used to perform {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}.

traits.locale_text: この武器は、敵の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}鎧{/g}や{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}防御{/g}を無視する{g|f:b4d660f34bef442fb7c5774741464ebe}フェイズストライク{/g}攻撃を装備者に与え、また{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}機会攻撃{/g}を行うのに使用されます。
